candidate_problems.text: Formalize the proposed dependency-structure criterion well enough to distinguish genuinely load-bearing abstract components from merely correlated ones across multiple explanations.
Determine when two explanations share the same hard-to-vary core despite different surface narratives, and when apparent paraphrase actually changes the dependency graph.
Test whether generativity is necessary for hard-to-vary status, or whether some explanations can be highly constrained yet narrow and non-generative.
